data.title: Valaris will participate in the Barclays Energy-Power Conference.
data.description: An unprecedented number of wildfires have ravaged the western United States, with over 40,000 fires reported this year alone. These fires have burned more than 5.4 million acres of land, resulting in the evacuation of tens of thousands of residents and causing significant damage to homes and ecosystems. The firefighting efforts have involved over 28,000 personnel, including firefighters and support teams, who have been working tirelessly to contain and extinguish the blazes. The immense scale of the wildfires has led to concerns about air quality and the long-term environmental impact of the devastation.

data.title: Western Union declares $0.235 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Sept 30, 2025. Commitment to global financial assistance.
data.description: In Denver, The Western Union Company (NYSE: WU) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.235 per common share. This dividend will be paid on September 30, 2025, to stockholders of record as of September 16, 2025. Western Union (NYSE: WU) aims to assist individuals globally in achieving financial security for themselves and their communities. Their prominent cross-border initiatives provide crucial services to those striving for a better financial future.

data.title: Gryphon's stock surges 231% before September merger with American Bitcoin amidst growing crypto company IPOs and US regulation advances.
data.description: The share price of Gryphon has been increasing as numerous crypto companies are choosing to go public. This trend coincides with advancements in digital asset regulation within the United States.

data.title: Dell beats Q2 targets but stock sinks on mixed outlook for current period, post-earnings.
data.description: In its fiscal second quarter, Dell Technologies exceeded expectations, but its guidance for the next period was mixed. This led to a decrease in Dell stock.

data.title: LayerZero (ZRO) price stays at $1.98 (+1.12%) after $58M token unlock, faces pressure from 25.71M tokens. Stargate merger in focus.
data.description: The price of ZRO remains stable at $1.98, showing a 1.12% increase. Traders are currently evaluating the positive impact of the upcoming Stargate merger against the negative pressure caused by the unlocking of 25.71 million tokens, valued at $58.36 million.

data.title: BEYOND Developments unveils Middle East’s first forest district by the sea, with Talea as its first residential tower.
data.description: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates, BEYOND Developments has announced the introduction of the Middle East's inaugural Forest District by the Sea. This groundbreaking project will spotlight Talea as its premier residential tower.

data.title: Gap Inc (NYSE: GAP) Q2 earnings show revenue at $3.73 billion, EPS at 57 cents vs. estimates of 55 cents. Company reports flat net sales with store sales down 1% and online sales up 3%.$q
data.description: Clothing company Gap Inc (NYSE: GAP) released its second-quarter financial results following the market close on Thursday. The Q2 revenue stood at $3.73 billion, aligning with expectations, while Q2 EPS was reported at 57 cents, surpassing estimates of 55 cents. Gap shares are slipping from recent levels. The net sales remained unchanged year-over-year, with store sales declining by 1% and online sales growing by 3%. The company indicated a 1% year-over-year increase in comparable sales. Additionally, Gap generated $308 million in income. For further details, read the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: S&P 500 hits new high post Nvidia earnings; 7 stocks show buy signal. Fed inflation data awaited. Dow Jones Futures up.
data.description: After reporting strong earnings, Nvidia contributed to the S&P 500 reaching a new high. Rubrik and Micron were among the top-performing stocks driving this upward trend. As investors await the Federal Reserve's inflation data, the market is showing optimism. Additionally, Dow Jones Futures surged following the news, with 7 stocks signaling a strong buy opportunity.

data.title: GSK-3 inhibitor market  - upswing due to newer, targeted programs in development, changing treatment landscape across diseases. Trial results could impact future.
data.description: The market for GSK-3 inhibitors is experiencing a surge in growth, driven by cutting-edge programs in mid- and late-stage development rather than traditional drugs like lithium. These innovative programs have the potential to revolutionize treatment approaches for various diseases. With a focus on more targeted therapies, significant advancements are expected to emerge from ongoing trials in the next few years, shaping the future of GSK-3 inhibitors in the medical landscape.

data.title: Trump fires Fed Governor Lisa Cook, claiming she falsified mortgage statements. Market concerns rise as Trump eyes full Fed overhaul and pressures Chair Powell to lower rates. Cook defiant, says no cause to fire her. Check full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: In a recent development, President Trump made another bold move to overhaul the Federal Reserve by firing Fed Governor Lisa Cook, the first Black woman on the Board, citing allegations of falsifying mortgage statements. Cook, however, rebutted the claims and refused to resign. This decision impacted the market, with long-dated U.S. Treasuries weakening and yields rising due to concerns over the Fed's independence and potential inflation and borrowing cost pressures. Trump's actions follow months of pressure on Fed Chair Jerome Powell to lower interest rates, though legally, a president cannot fire the Fed chair. This incident also coincides with his nomination of Stephen Miran, contributing to evolving dynamics at the Federal Reserve. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
